name: Shopify Plus
notes: Standard for high-end commerce. Bonus offers historically run through Mar 31. Apply: https://www.shopify.com/affiliates. Hosted on Impact — has API for earnings.

name: Klaviyo
notes: Essential for luxury VIP email segmenting. K:Partners program relaunched for 2026. Apply: https://www.klaviyo.com/partner-program

name: Gorgias
commission: 20% recurring (first 2 years, capped — VIP Partner status removes cap)
notes: High-end ecommerce helpdesk. Push for VIP Partner status to unlock lifetime. Apply: https://www.gorgias.com/partners

name: Triple Whale
notes: Luxury brands love their data. Note the 6-month commission cap — not a lifetime program. Apply: https://www.triplewhale.com/partners

name: Cin7
notes: High-ticket inventory for jewelry/watches/luxury retailers. Top referrers can earn $10k–$100k/year. Apply: https://www.cin7.com/partner-program/

name: LiveRecover
notes: SMS-based cart recovery. One of the few with a true lifetime policy. Apply: https://liverecover.com/partners

name: GoHighLevel
notes: Carried over from LuxeRetailStack — VERIFY with GHL whether the same fp_ref code can be used for promoting from luxeretailstack.com or if a separate registration is required.

name: Unbounce
notes: Best for high-design luxury landing pages that outperform stock templates. Apply: https://unbounce.com/partner-program/. PartnerStack has API.

name: AWeber
notes: Carried over from LuxeRetailStack (id=560455). VERIFY same ID can be used on luxeretailstack.com or register separately. Stable backup for newer tools that capped commissions.

name: Jotform (Agency)
notes: Use the AGENCY tier for lifetime 30% — don't apply to standard program. Luxury angle: concierge intake forms, private appointment booking. Apply: https://www.jotform.com/affiliate-program/
